source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 沈阳今日全市停课停工
topics.official_english: Shenyang Suspends Classes and Work Due to Severe Weather
topics.why_hot: Severe weather prompts citywide emergency measures, affecting millions.
topics.share_angle: Explain how Chinese cities respond to extreme weather with swift public safety measures.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国首个禁售燃油车省份确认
topics.official_english: China's First Province Confirms Ban on Gasoline Vehicle Sales
topics.why_hot: Major policy shift in China's push for electric vehicles and carbon neutrality.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the implications for the auto industry and environment.

topics.chinese_topic: 巴威远程攻击 东北暴雨大暴雨
topics.official_english: Typhoon Bavi Brings Heavy Rain to Northeast China
topics.why_hot: Typhoon Bavi causes widespread flooding and damage in the region.
topics.share_angle: Explain the science behind typhoons and their increasing intensity.

topics.chinese_topic: 如何防范山洪、泥石流等次生灾害
topics.official_english: How to Prevent Secondary Disasters Like Flash Floods and Mudslides
topics.why_hot: Public seeks safety tips amid ongoing severe weather.
topics.share_angle: Provide practical disaster preparedness advice for viewers.

topics.chinese_topic: 上海300多株倒伏树木一夜清零
topics.official_english: Shanghai Clears Over 300 Fallen Trees Overnight After Storm
topics.why_hot: Efficient urban management response to storm damage impresses public.
topics.share_angle: Highlight the efficiency of Chinese city management in crisis.

topics.chinese_topic: 大众计划削减50%车型减产100万辆
topics.official_english: Volkswagen Plans to Cut 50% of Models, Reduce Production by 1 Million Vehicles
topics.why_hot: Major restructuring in global auto industry amid EV transition.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the impact on global auto market and Chinese manufacturers.

topics.chinese_topic: 中国游客在韩国救下一车人
topics.official_english: Chinese Tourist Rescues Group in South Korea
topics.why_hot: Acts of heroism by Chinese citizens abroad generate national pride.
topics.share_angle: Share a positive story of cross-border kindness and bravery.

topics.official_english: Kung Fu Women's Football' Box Office Surpasses 500 Million Yuan
topics.why_hot: Chinese film combines sports and martial arts, resonating with audiences.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the rise of women's sports films in China.
